creator: brad@facefault.org
text:
Further information:

The kernel is entirely stock; make.conf is unaltered and nothing has been built from source.

Hardware is a Thinkpad X220 Tablet

Information that was previously buried in logs:

The network card involved in this BZ is a Realtek RTL8188CE.

uname -a:

FreeBSD naoko.facefault.org 11.0-RC3 FreeBSD 11.0-RC3 #0 r305786: Wed Sep 14 02:19:25 UTC 2016     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
